problem.statement: Engineering project readiness still needs one canonical preview payload instead of partial local synthesis.
problem.scope: Preview payload and reason codes only.
problem.symptom: Readiness state is not yet returned through one canonical preview payload.

execution_flow: request preview payload by app id

hypotheses.statement: One preview payload will make engineering readiness rendering stable across adapters.

risks.statement: Preview fields may drift if step-state concerns are mixed into the payload.

decision_execution_path.decision: bind the payload to the preview path

triggers: preview starts to include step state
actions: keep step state in the open/import spec
attach debug evidence when preview state and source state diverge
